svg.text: Autonomous Multi-Agent Orchestration System · Powered by Claude Code SDK
POST /api/supervisor/dispatch — One sentence, system handles everything
"做一个天气App，要好看，要能查5天预报"
Fast keyword matching → LLM fallback for ambiguous input

g.text: 1. 分析需求 → 2. 拆解子任务 → 3. 分配Agent → 4. 监控
子任务带依赖图: PM→UI→Dev→QA→Ops (自动并行)

svg.text: Output: JSON subtask array with dependencies
Gate Mode: auto (自动推进) | manual (人工审批)
Context Manager: 前序摘要 + 直接前驱全文 → 节省token

g.text: 用户选择Agent → 直接执行 → 返回结果
适用: review, deploy, test, 翻译, 内容创作

svg.text: Priority: urgent > high > normal > low | 6 concurrent workers | Auto-retry (exponential backoff)
Dependency check before dequeue · Server restart auto-recovery · Graceful shutdown

g.text: Claude Code SDK (query → AsyncGenerator<SDKMessage>) → CLI fallback (claude --print --output-format stream-json)

svg.text: Each pipeline gets isolated branch & directory · Artifacts written per stage · Auto-merge on completion

g.text: Frontend: React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind + Zustand + Vite
Backend: Express 5 + TypeScript + SQLite (WAL) + BullMQ + Redis + WebSocket
Runtime: Claude Code SDK (@anthropic-ai/claude-code) + CLI fallback

svg.text: pnpm monorepo: packages/server + packages/dashboard · agents/*.md skill files · templates/*.yaml pipeline definitions
Agent Factory v0.1.0 — Architecture Diagram — Generated 2026-04-19
